instruction: Walk into the kitchen area. Walk by the sink and oven. Walk straight into the hallway. turn right into the little room. Turn left and walk into the bedroom. Stop by the corner of the bed.

I'm noticing this is a different part of the house entirely—a large open dining area with glass folding doors leading outside and a dining table set up, which doesn't match the hallway from the original image. I should backtrack to the starting point and reorient myself.

This matches the earlier view I had when I turned right ninety degrees—it's the same bedroom with the single bed and yellow throw, so I'm on the right track.
